message:
fix(messaging): six correctness bugs in JetStream client

- HIGH: ACK reply subject parser uses tail indices for dotted stream/consumer names
- HIGH: error detection changed to "error":{"code": envelope match (no false positives)
- MEDIUM: parse_api_error checks err_code 10059 for StreamNotFound (not HTTP code)
- MEDIUM: consumer_count u64→u32 with saturating clamp
- MEDIUM: pull_with_timeout loop continues on status/control messages
- MEDIUM: extract_json_string_simple handles \uXXXX escape sequences
- 5 regression tests added

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
